    <item>
      <title>Victor Wembanyama's scary fall puts Spurs' playoff chances in peril</title>
      <description>After a scary fall put San Antonio Spurs center Victor Wembanyama in the concussion protocol early in Game 2, his team will have to scramble to win without the Defensive Player of the Year.</description>
      <pubDate>21 Apr 2026 21:21:28 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/victor_wembanyamas_scary_fall_puts_spurs_playoff_chances_in_peril/s1_13132_43755465</link>

        <media:title> San Antonio Spurs forward Victor Wembanyama falls to the ground during the first half of Game 2 of the first round of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Frost Bank Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>

    <item>
      <title>Pistons blow out Magic in Game 2 with dominant third quarter</title>
      <description>Through the first six quarters of their first-round series, the Orlando Magic were as good or better than the top-seeded Detroit Pistons. Then the third quarter of Game 2 happened.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Patrick Ewing explains why he would still dominate modern NBA era</title>
      <description>The 1990s basketball era gets remembered for one thing above all else: physicality. Games were slower, grittier and built around power in the paint. That reputation created a narrative that dominant big men from that decade wouldn't survive in today's game. Patrick Ewing doesn't buy it.</description>
      <pubDate>22 Apr 2026 18:33:12 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/patrick_ewing_explains_why_he_would_still_dominate_modern_nba_era/s1_13132_43758689</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/patrick_ewing_explains_why_he_would_still_dominate_modern_nba_era/s1_13132_43758689</guid>
      <author>Yagya Bhargava, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/0/c/0cd6cdf58a8f5d9d6fbf7db59b90db59ac4ac99c/thumb_16x9/patrick-ewing-explains-he-would-still-dominate.jpg">
        <media:credit> Wendell Cruz-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Former NBA center Patrick Ewing. </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>New York Knicks</category>
      <category>Georgetown Hoyas</category>
      <category>Patrick Ewing</category>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>LeBron James outduels Kevin Durant as Lakers take 2-0 series lead</title>
      <description>Tuesday night, LeBron James and Kevin Durant met in the postseason for the first time since 2018. Durant started hot but James and the Los Angeles Lakers closed stronger in their 101-94 win over the Houston Rockets.</description>
      <pubDate>22 Apr 2026 09:06:36 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/lebron_james_outduels_kevin_durant_as_lakers_take_2_0_series_lead/s1_13132_43755861</link>

        <media:credit> Jayne Kamin-Oncea-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Houston Rockets guard Josh Okogie (20) defends Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23). </media:title>
      </media:content>
      <category>NBA</category>
      <category>Houston Rockets</category>
      <category>Los Angeles Lakers</category>
      <category>Kevin Durant</category>
      <category>LeBron James</category>
    </item>

      <title>Colin Cowherd floats intriguing NBA playoff team for Billy Donovan's next job </title>

    <item>
      <title>Draymond Green makes big prediction about Steve Kerr's future with Warriors</title>
      <description>Green believes Kerr has coached his last game for the Golden State Warriors.</description>
      <pubDate>22 Apr 2026 15:35:11 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/draymond_green_makes_big_prediction_about_steve_kerrs_future_with_warriors/s1_13132_43751056</link>
      <guid>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/draymond_green_makes_big_prediction_about_steve_kerrs_future_with_warriors/s1_13132_43751056</guid>
      <author>Clark Dalton, Yardbarker</author>
      <media:content url="http://www.yardbarker.com/media/f/6/f6d52647ce0873bd337f45f678acc2736a9e6a4d/thumb_16x9/green-makes-big-prediction-kerrs-future-warriors.jpg">
        <media:credit> Mark J. Rebilas-Imagn Images </media:credit>
        <media:title> Golden State Warriors guard Stephen Curry (30) with forward Draymond Green and head coach Steve Kerr against the Phoenix Suns during the closing seconds of the play-in rounds of the 2026 NBA Playoffs at Mortgage Matchup Center. </media:title>
      </media:content>
